code:
--- config: theme: dark --- flowchart TD reed_in_the_wind[Reed in the Wind] click reed_in_the_wind callback " Reed in the Wind

Cost: 1 mote per 2 dice Duration: Instant Type: Reflexive Minimum Dodge: 2 Minimum Essence: 1 Prerequisite Charms: None The Exalted lets Essence flow through her body, making her motions as smooth as those of reeds and willows in the wind. For each mote spent, add 2 dice to an attempt to dodge an attack that the character can anticipate coming. A character cannot gain more dice than her regular Dexterity + Dodge pool. The player must declare she is using this Charm and how much Essence she will spend on it before her character's opponent makes his attack roll. If there are an odd number of dice in the characters Dexterity + Dodge pool, the fractional mote left over after buying the last die is lost.

Errata:
Each mote spent on Reed in the Wind adds 2 dice to the character’s Dexterity + Dodge pool, not 1 die as the Charm description at one point implies. " shadow_over_water[Shadow Over Water] reed_in_the_wind --> shadow_over_water click shadow_over_water callback " Shadow Over Water

Cost: 2 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Dodge: 3
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: Reed in the Wind

Like shadows over water, the Exalted moves with perfect, fluid grace and speed. The character may dodge a single attack that he can anticipate with his full Dexterity + Dodge pool. Characters must spend the Essence for Shadow Over Water before his opponent makes her attack roll. " seven_shadow_evasion[Seven Shadow Evasion] shadow_over_water --> seven_shadow_evasion click seven_shadow_evasion callback " Seven Shadow Evasion

Cost: 6 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Dodge: 5
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: Shadow Over Water

From Shadows Over Water to shadow itself, the character is too quick to be hit at all. The character can use this Charm to evade, without the need for a roll, any single attack that she can anticipate, even one that has an area of effect. A character must invoke Seven Shadow Evasion before her opponent makes his attack roll. " reflex_sidestep_technique[Reflex Sidestep Technique] reed_in_the_wind --> reflex_sidestep_technique click reflex_sidestep_technique callback " Reflex Sidestep Technique

Cost: 2 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Dodge: 3
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: Reed in the Wind

The character's attunement to the interaction of her anima with the ambient Essence of Creation makes her preternaturally aware of her surroundings. By using this Charm, she may dodge attacks that she is not even aware of. If the character is attacked, even by an attack she does not anticipate, she may spend 2 motes of Essence to attempt to evade the attack. The character's dice pool for dodging such attacks is equal to (2 x her permanent Essence score). Reflex Sidestep Technique cannot be used as part of a Combo with other Dodge Charms. Although the character does not perceive the situation until she has already dodged, the player may choose whether or not the character spends the Essence to dodge the blow. If she chooses to dodge, she must spend the Essence to do so before the attacker makes his roll. " flow_like_blood[Flow Like Blood] reflex_sidestep_technique --> flow_like_blood seven_shadow_evasion --> flow_like_blood click flow_like_blood callback " Flow Like Blood

Cost: 5 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: One scene
Type: Simple
Minimum Dodge: 5
Minimum Essence: 3
Prerequisite Charms: Reflex Sidestep Technique, Seven Shadow Evasion

The character permeates his being with Essence, becoming partly atomized. He moves with an impossible fluid grace, and those attacks that he cannot dodge often pass harmlessly through his dreamlike body. For the rest of the scene, the character may use his full Dexterity + Dodge dice pool to dodge all physical attacks, perceived or not. " subgraph Castebook Night leaping_dodge_method[Leaping Dodge Method] click leaping_dodge_method callback " Leaping Dodge Method

Cost: 4 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Dodge: 3
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: Shadow Over Water

When attacked, the Exalted makes a prodigious leap to take herself out of harms way. When making any dodge using this Charm, the character avoids the attack by leaping up to (Strength + Athletics) x 3 yards vertically or twice this distance horizontally. The Exalt can choose the exact direction and distance of this leap, so long as it is away from her attacker. Leaping Dodge Method is explicitly permitted to be part of a Combo with any Dodge Charms, including Reflex Sidestep Technique. This Charm will break multiple attack techniques if the attacker cannot follow the dodging character. " end shadow_over_water --> leaping_dodge_method
repo_description: Interactive charms graphs for Exalted first Edition

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为《Exalted》的闪避系Charm建立一个完整的流程图。核心起点是"Reed in the Wind"——风中之苇，这是一个基础Charm，花费1点精华每2颗骰子，能提升闪避检定。
明白了，这是一个即时型、反射动作的Charm。我注意到它的先决条件是"无"，所以应该是整个闪避树的根节点。那从它延伸出去的分支有哪些？
从"风中之苇"分出两条主线。第一条向上：经过"Shadow Over Water"——水上之影，最终到达"Seven Shadow Evasion"——七影闪避。这是一条追求极致闪避能力的路线。
确认一下，"水上之影"需要闪避3、精华1，花费2点精华，可以用完整的敏捷+闪避池来闪避单次攻击。然后"七影闪避"是这条线的顶端？
对，"七影闪避"是这条线的顶点，花费6点精华，可以无需检定直接闪避任何可预见的攻击，包括范围效果。但还有另一条分支——"Reflex Sidestep Technique"，反射侧步技法，从"风中之苇"直接分出。
这个我需要注意一下。"反射侧步技法"的特殊之处在于它可以闪避无法预见的攻击，骰池是2倍永久精华值。而且它有个重要限制：不能与其他闪避Charm组成连击。
没错。而"反射侧步技法"继续延伸到"Flow Like Blood"——血流如注，这是一个场景持续性的Charm。同时"七影闪避"也指向"血流如注"，这意味着两条主线在这里汇合。
所以"血流如注"有两个先决条件：需要同时掌握"反射侧步技法"和"七影闪避"。它花费5点精华加1点意志力，效果是在整个场景内用完整骰池闪避所有物理攻击。
还有一条支线需要单独处理。在《Castebook: Night》中有一个"Leaping Dodge Method"——跳跃闪避法，从"水上之影"延伸出来。这个需要放在子图里标注来源。
"跳跃闪避法"的特点是位移效果对吧？可以垂直跳(力量+运动)×3码，水平两倍距离。而且它明确允许与任何闪避Charm组成连击，包括"反射侧步技法"。
正是。另外我注意到"风中之苇"有个勘误需要标注——每点精华应该加2颗骰子，而不是描述中暗示的1颗。这个细节要放在回调信息里。
好的，我正在构建结构。根节点"风中之苇"向上连接"水上之影"，"水上之影"再向上到"七影闪避"。同时"风中之苇"向右连接"反射侧步技法"，然后到"血流如注"。"七影闪避"也指向"血流如注"形成汇合。
等等，我需要确认"跳跃闪避法"的位置。它虽然从"水上之影"引出，但属于Night Castebook的内容，应该放在单独的子图区域里，避免和核心流程混淆。
已调整。现在"跳跃闪避法"被包裹在名为"Castebook Night"的子图中，从"水上之影"引入连线。所有节点的回调信息都包含了完整的规则文本：花费、持续时间、类型、最低技能要求、先决条件，以及详细描述。
检查一下"血流如注"的先决条件描述——它确实需要同时满足"反射侧步技法"和"七影闪避"两个Charm，对吗？
确认无误。"血流如血"的先决条件明确列出两个Charm：Reflex Sidestep Technique和Seven Shadow Evasion。整个结构现在完整了：一条基础线分化为两条进阶线，最终在"血流如注"汇合，外加Night Castebook的跳跃分支。
